assertions.evidence: After --source openclaw --dry-run, target workspace directory does not exist and target .env file does not exist. No files were created or modified.
assertions.details: Created fresh temp dir, ran dry-run, verified target ws and .env don't exist afterward

assertions.evidence: report.json contains 3 items with status 'would_migrate': memory (reason='Would merge memory (0 daily files)'), tools (reason='Would create TOOLS.md'), env-channels (reason='Would update .env with channels settings')
assertions.details: Parsed report.json from dry-run output, verified would_migrate status and descriptive reasons

assertions.evidence: Terminal output shows formatted summary table with Migrated/Archived/Skipped/Conflicts/Errors counts, followed by '⚠️  This was a dry run. No files were modified.' and 'Run with --execute to perform the actual migration.'
assertions.details: Captured full terminal output from dry-run, verified summary format and dry-run message
